nodes.html: This study applies Cognitive Load Theory to analyze usability challenges and evaluate the effectiveness of accessibility guidelines of mobile and web applications for autistic users.

frontmatter.title: A Mapping Review to Understand Web and Mobile Apps Accessibility for Adults with Autism
frontmatter.venueDetails: Proceedings of the 21st Brazilian Symposium on Information Systems

nodes.html: This study investigates the accessibility of urban mobility apps for autistic individuals using the Interfaces Accessibility Guide for Autism (GAIA).By evaluating various apps, we have identified a common gap regarding accessibility for people with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD).

frontmatter.title: A Comparative Study on Accessibility for Autistic Individuals with Urban Mobility Apps
frontmatter.venueDetails: Proceedings of the 23rd Brazilian Symposium on Human Factors in Computing Systems, 2024
